metadata.source_file: Corral 20 Pad A _ X12 _ 6 wells _ Approved Drilling Program.pdf

data.document_type: Batch Drilling Order / Delaware Basin Supplement
data.location: New Mexico, Eddy County, Jal (Delaware Basin)

wells.coordinate_system: NAD27 New Mexico State Plane, Eastern Zone, US Feet

casing_program.cement_details: Lead: Squeeze 14.8 lbm/gal | 182.34 bbl | 706.05 sack | 100% excess | 1.45 ft3/sack | Top MD/TVD: 32/32 ft; Tail: Primary 15.6 lbm/gal | 108.66 bbl | 496.02 sack | 50% excess | 1.23 ft3/sack | Top MD/TVD: 5360/5355.9 ft
Tail: Tail 13.2 lbm/gal | 312.29 bbl | 1234.78 sack | 25% excess | 1.42 ft3/sack | Top MD/TVD: 8831.1/8827 ft

drilling_sections.comments: Planned on 8°/100' DLS build (from well specific notes).
Utilize AutoDAS in lateral for parameter control.

drilling_fluids.comments: FIT listed: 11 lbm/gal; Notes: DO w/ BDE (~8.2 ppg).
FIT listed: 13 lbm/gal; Monitor OWR; utilize MPD prior to MW for BG/connection gas.

risks_and_hazards.comments: Risk of losses in Salt due to Rustler and Salado outcropping to West; cross flows during INT1 bradenhead observed.
Shallow air pockets encountered in the area.
Monitor OWR during trips; BG and connection gas may be observed; utilize MPD/stripping/caps to manage pressure.

wells.notes: Delaware Basin - Well Specific Notes indicate curve planned at 8 deg/100 build; full string of W441 on production string; Minimum ICP setting depth = 50' into 3rd BS Carb (TOP @ 8836' TVD).

drilling_sections.primary_bit: Reed TKF66-CT2 (TFA 1.18) OR HDBS HD64MKS (Machete) (TFA 0.37) (notes show mixed selections)

drilling_sections.comments: Planned on 8°/100' DLS build (from well specific notes).
Utilize AutoDAS in lateral for parameter control.

drilling_fluids.comments: FIT listed: 12.4 lbm/gal; lateral note includes strict window crossing Shocker 20 Federal Com 001H.

risks_and_hazards.comments: Risk of losses in Salt due to Rustler and Salado outcropping to West; cross flows during INT1 bradenhead observed.
Shallow air pockets encountered in the area.
Shocker 20 Federal Com 001H: E-W well, must be 1.2 SF, no geosteering until offset is passed; 9A strict window.

wells.notes: Minimum ICP setting depth = 50' into 2rd BS Carb (TOP @ 7960 TVD) (as written in notes).
